PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 502 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "porta 502 AINDA em uso por PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)" } else { "porta 502 livre \(mock parado\)" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 502 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 400; "mock \(PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)\) encerrado" } else { "porta 502 já livre" }; $c2 = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 502 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c2\) { "AINDA em uso" } else { "porta 502 livre agora" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 502 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force; "mock \(PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)\) encerrado" } else { "porta 502 já livre" })

PowerShell(foreach \($p in 502,8000\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "porta $p \(PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)\) encerrada" } else { "porta $p já livre" } })
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec mssql-server /opt/mssql-tools18/bin/sqlcmd -S localhost -U sa -P 'Str0ng!Passw0rd2025' -C -d MES_Core -i /tmp/cadastro_mes_as.sql)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec mssql-server /opt/mssql-tools18/bin/sqlcmd -S localhost -U sa -P 'Str0ng!Passw0rd2025' -C -d MES_Core -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT nu_endereco AS D, tx_descricao, nu_qtd_words AS words, nu_divisor AS divisor FROM tb_registrador WHERE id_ihm=8 ORDER BY nu_endereco; SELECT tx_ip_address, tx_port_number FROM tb_ihm WHERE id_ihm=8;" -W)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec mssql-server /opt/mssql-tools18/bin/sqlcmd -S localhost -U sa -P 'Str0ng!Passw0rd2025' -C -d MES_Core -Q "DELETE FROM tb_log_registrador WHERE id_ihm=8; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS logs_restantes FROM tb_log_registrador WHERE id_ihm=8;" -W)
Bash(IHMS=8 DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=14330 DB_NAME=MES_Core DB_USER=sa DB_PASSWORD='Str0ng!Passw0rd2025' DB_DRIVER='{ODBC Driver 18 for SQL Server}' python main.py)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec mssql-server /opt/mssql-tools18/bin/sqlcmd -S localhost -U sa -P 'Str0ng!Passw0rd2025' -C -d MES_Core -W -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS total_logs_maq8 FROM tb_log_registrador WHERE id_ihm=8; SELECT TOP 8 r.tx_descricao, lr.nu_valor_bruto, CONVERT\(varchar,lr.dt_created_at,121\) dt FROM tb_log_registrador lr JOIN tb_registrador r ON r.id_registrador=lr.id_registrador WHERE lr.id_ihm=8 ORDER BY lr.dt_created_at DESC;")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec mssql-server /opt/mssql-tools18/bin/sqlcmd -S localhost -U sa -P 'Str0ng!Passw0rd2025' -C -d MES_Core -W -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT session_id, blocking_session_id, wait_type, wait_time, LEFT\(CAST\(t.text AS varchar\(80\)\),80\) AS sql_txt FROM sys.dm_exec_requests r CROSS APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text\(r.sql_handle\) t WHERE r.session_id > 50 AND r.session_id <> @@SPID;")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec mssql-server /opt/mssql-tools18/bin/sqlcmd -S localhost -U sa -P 'Str0ng!Passw0rd2025' -C -d MES_Core -W -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT l.id_linha_producao lid, l.tx_name linha, COUNT\(i.id_ihm\) maquinas FROM tb_linha_producao l LEFT JOIN tb_ihm i ON i.id_linha_producao=l.id_linha_producao GROUP BY l.id_linha_producao,l.tx_name ORDER BY lid; SELECT id_ihm, tx_name FROM tb_ihm ORDER BY id_ihm;")
